# my-docs

> A modern documentation framework for JavaScript projects. Built on Next.js 14 with full-text search and zero-config deployment.

## Project details

- Language: JavaScript
- License: MIT
- Framework: Next.js 14

## Docs

- [Documentation](/docs/)
- [Getting started](/docs/getting-started)
- [API reference](/docs/api)

## Optional

- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/example/my-docs)
- [Blog](/blog/)
